raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad brehze tee Js.aëta
Behrni us to Kungu favu Dee-
wu / jo winnu Gars btja nogur-
ris/ ta pehz ka wiſſi winnu Ee-
natdneekt bij apkahrt teem met-
tufchees/ ka arri aisbehgt ne war-
reja no winnu Widdus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſ tas Lehgeris to
Affireeu / wiſſi Rahjineeki un
Ratti un winnu Sirgi valikle
apkahrt winneem trihede+mits
un tschetras Deenas. Tad pa-
mirre wiſſi Betulijas Eedsihwo-
taji.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiſſi winnu Uhdens Trau-
ki un Palti btja jaw tſfmeltt / ka
teem ne tik dauds wairs Uhdens
bija/ ka weena Deena wehl dsert
warretu / jo teem tappe ar wee-
nu Mehru dsert dohts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad panihke winnu Behr-
niti un winnu Seewas / un
winnu Jaunekti pamirre no Uh-
dens-Badda/ un kritte us Pills-
fakta Gelahm un pee Wahreem
Gemme/ un ne btja wairs Speh-
ta pee winneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Luo yapizginaujags
si Laudis pee Ozijus/ un pe-
Vilsfahtn Leelecim Knugee
Jaunekti un Seewas un B-
ni/ un brehze ar stipru Ba-
un runnaja preeksch wiſſ
Wezzajeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lai Deews fohda st
munis un jums/ jo juhs e-
leelu Metaifnibu pee munis
rtjschi/ ka juhs ne effat no D-
raar teem Affireeem runnaj
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet nu munis neka
Paligs irr/ bet Deews irr m-
winnu Rohkas vahrdewis/
mehs winnu Breetfcha bo-
cetam zaur Uhdens-Baddu
leelu Pasuschauu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad // atatzina
tohs/ un redohdeet wiſſu Pa-
fahru par Laupijumu Olover
Laudim / un wiſſam wi-
Karra-Spehkam;
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas irr labbaki /
mehs teem par Laupijumu
pam/ tad bubfim mehs par-
veem un paliktim dsihwf / u-
redsefin ar sawahin Azzim m-
fus Behrnis nomirſtam / n-
muhfu Seewas un Deblus
was Dwebfeles islaischam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Mehs kemnam Del-
un Semmi pahrjuns par L-
neefu/ ir muhfu Deewu u-
Kungu muhfu Tehwu kas ni-
fohd muhtu Grehku deht un ni-
su Tehwu Grehku deht/ ka wi-
nums schodeen ta ne darra-
mehs runnajam.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
